package com.example.service;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.net.*;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.Base64;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import javax.net.ssl.HostnameVerifier;
import javax.net.ssl.HttpsURLConnection;
import javax.net.ssl.SNIHostName;
import javax.net.ssl.SSLParameters;
import javax.net.ssl.SSLSocket;
import javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory;

/**
 * A service to fetch and preview content from a given URL.
 * This is commonly used for generating link previews in applications.
 */
public class UrlPreviewService {

    private static final int MAX_REDIRECTS = 5;
    private static final int CONNECT_TIMEOUT = 5000;
    private static final int READ_TIMEOUT = 5000;

    /**
     * Fetches the content from the provided URL string and returns a summary.
     * The summary is the first few lines of the resource content.
     *
     * @param urlString The URL of the resource to fetch.
     * @return A string containing a preview of the content, or an error message if fetching fails.
     */
    public String getUrlContentPreview(String urlString) {
        try {
            URL currentUrl = new URL(urlString);
            int redirectCount = 0;

            while (redirectCount < MAX_REDIRECTS) {
                // Validate the URL and get a public, non-reserved IP address for the host
                InetAddress validatedIp = validateUrlAndGetIp(currentUrl);
                String originalHost = currentUrl.getHost();
                int originalPort = currentUrl.getPort();
                int defaultPort = currentUrl.getDefaultPort();

                // Build the URL using the validated IP to avoid DNS rebinding (TOCTOU)
                URL ipUrl = new URL(
                        currentUrl.getProtocol(),
                        validatedIp.getHostAddress(),
                        originalPort,
                        currentUrl.getFile()
                );

                // Open connection to the validated IP
                URLConnection connection = ipUrl.openConnection();
                connection.setConnectTimeout(CONNECT_TIMEOUT);
                connection.setReadTimeout(READ_TIMEOUT);

                // Configure HTTP-specific settings
                if (connection instanceof HttpURLConnection) {
                    HttpURLConnection httpConn = (HttpURLConnection) connection;
                    httpConn.setInstanceFollowRedirects(false);

                    // Set correct Host header with original host (and port if non-default)
                    String hostHeader = originalHost;
                    if (originalPort!= -1 && originalPort!= defaultPort) {
                        hostHeader += ":" + originalPort;
                    }
                    httpConn.setRequestProperty("Host", hostHeader);

                    // Set Basic Auth if URL contains user info
                    String userInfo = currentUrl.getUserInfo();
                    if (userInfo!= null &&!userInfo.isEmpty()) {
                        String encodedAuth = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(userInfo.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
                        httpConn.setRequestProperty("Authorization", "Basic " + encodedAuth);
                    }

                    // Configure HTTPS-specific settings (SNI, hostname verification)
                    if (connection instanceof HttpsURLConnection) {
                        HttpsURLConnection httpsConn = (HttpsURLConnection) connection;
                        // Set custom SSLSocketFactory to add SNI with original hostname
                        httpsConn.setSSLSocketFactory(new SniSslSocketFactory(originalHost));
                        // Verify certificate against original hostname, not the IP address
                        httpsConn.setHostnameVerifier((hostname, session) -> {
                            HostnameVerifier defaultVerifier = HttpsURLConnection.getDefaultHostnameVerifier();
                            return defaultVerifier.verify(originalHost, session);
                        });
                    }

                    // Check for redirect responses
                    int responseCode = httpConn.getResponseCode();
                    if (responseCode >= 300 && responseCode < 400) {
                        String location = httpConn.getHeaderField("Location");
                        if (location == null || location.trim().isEmpty()) {
                            httpConn.disconnect();
                            return "Error: Redirect response missing Location header.";
                        }
                        // Resolve the redirect location against the original URL (not the IP-based URL)
                        currentUrl = new URL(currentUrl, location);
                        redirectCount++;
                        httpConn.disconnect();
                        continue;
                    } else if (responseCode!= HttpURLConnection.HTTP_OK) {
                        httpConn.disconnect();
                        return "Error: HTTP request failed with status code " + responseCode;
                    }
                } else {
                    // This should not occur as we validate protocol is HTTP/HTTPS
                    return "Error: Unsupported connection type.";
                }

                // Read and return the first 5 lines of content as preview
                try (BufferedReader reader = new BufferedReader(
                        new InputStreamReader(connection.getInputStream(), StandardCharsets.UTF_8))) {
                    return reader.lines().limit(5).collect(Collectors.joining("\n"));
                } finally {
                    // Ensure HTTP connection is closed
                    if (connection instanceof HttpURLConnection) {
                        ((HttpURLConnection) connection).disconnect();
                    }
                }
            }

            return "Error: Exceeded maximum number of redirects (" + MAX_REDIRECTS + ").";

        } catch (Exception e) {
            return "Error fetching content from URL: " + e.getMessage();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validates that the URL is allowed (supported protocol, allowed port, non-resolved host IP)
     * and returns a valid public IP address for the host.
     *
     * @param url The URL to validate
     * @return A public, non-reserved InetAddress for the URL's host
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the URL is invalid or not allowed
     * @throws UnknownHostException     if the host cannot be resolved to IP addresses
     */
    private InetAddress validateUrlAndGetIp(URL url) throws IllegalArgumentException, UnknownHostException {
        // Validate only HTTP/HTTPS protocols are allowed
        String protocol = url.getProtocol().toLowerCase();
        if (!"http".equals(protocol) &&!"https".equals(protocol)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid protocol '" + protocol + "'. Only HTTP and HTTPS are allowed.");
        }

        // Validate only ports 80 (HTTP) and 443 (HTTPS) are allowed
        int port = url.getPort();
        int defaultPort = url.getDefaultPort();
        int effectivePort = (port == -1)? defaultPort : port;
        if (effectivePort!= 80 && effectivePort!= 443) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid port " + effectivePort + ". Only ports 80 (HTTP) and 443 (HTTPS) are allowed.");
        }

        // Validate host is present
        String host = url.getHost();
        if (host == null || host.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("URL is missing a host.");
        }

        // Resolve all IP addresses for the host
        InetAddress[] addresses = InetAddress.getAllByName(host);
        if (addresses.length == 0) {
            throw new UnknownHostException("Could not resolve host: " + host);
        }

        // Ensure all resolved IP addresses are public (non-reserved/internal)
        for (InetAddress addr : addresses) {
            if (isReservedAddress(addr)) {
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Host '" + host + "' resolves to a reserved IP address: " + addr.getHostAddress());
            }
        }

        // Return the first valid IP (all are validated as public, so any is acceptable)
        return addresses[0];
    }

    /**
     * Checks if the given InetAddress is a reserved, private, or internal IP address.
     * Covers both IPv4 and IPv6 reserved ranges.
     *
     * @param addr The InetAddress to check
     * @return true if the address is reserved/internal, false if it's a public address
     */
    private boolean isReservedAddress(InetAddress addr) {
        // Check common reserved address types using built-in methods
        if (addr.isLoopbackAddress() || addr.isLinkLocalAddress() || addr.isSiteLocalAddress() ||
            addr.isMulticastAddress() || addr.isAnyLocalAddress()) {
            return true;
        }

        byte[] addressBytes = addr.getAddress();
        if (addressBytes.length == 4) {
            // Convert IPv4 address to integer for range checks
            int ip = ((addressBytes[0] & 0xFF) << 24) |
                     ((addressBytes[1] & 0xFF) << 16) |
                     ((addressBytes[2] & 0xFF) << 8) |
                     (addressBytes[3] & 0xFF);

            // 0.0.0.0/8 (Current network)
            if ((ip & 0xFF000000) == 0x00000000) return true;
            // 10.0.0.0/8 (Private network)
            if ((ip & 0xFF000000) == 0x0A000000) return true;
            // 100.64.0.0/10 (CGNAT shared address space)
            if ((ip & 0xFFC00000) == 0x64400000) return true;
            // 127.0.0.0/8 (Loopback)
            if ((ip & 0xFF000000) == 0x7F000000) return true;
            // 169.254.0.0/16 (Link-local)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFF0000) == 0xA9FE0000) return true;
            // 172.16.0.0/12 (Private network)
            if ((ip & 0xFFF00000) == 0xAC100000) return true;
            // 192.0.0.0/24 (IETF protocol assignments)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFFFF00) == 0xC0000000) return true;
            // 192.0.2.0/24 (TEST-NET-1)

            // 192.168.0.0/16 (Private network)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFF0000) == 0xC0A80000) return true;
            // 198.18.0.0/15 (Benchmark testing)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFE0000) == 0xC6120000) return true;
            // 198.51.100.0/24 (TEST-NET-2)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFFFF00) == 0xC6336400) return true;
            // 203.0.113.0/24 (TEST-NET-3)
            if ((ip & 0xFFFFFF00) == 0xCB007100) return true;
